source.section: Part 15 - Navigation & Case III Recovery > 5 - Waypoints > 5.3 - Manual vs Auto Sequencing

steps.action: Go in HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator) page
Select desired Waypoint Sequence (SEQ#1, SEQ#2 or SEQ#3 depending on your flight plan)
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to SEQ1, SEQ2, or SEQ3 to select your sequence.

steps.action: Press the OSB (Option Select Button) next to AUTO if you want automatic waypoint sequencing (boxed). Leave it OFF if you want manual waypoint sequencing (unboxed) 5 - WAYPOINTS
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to AUTO to box it for automatic sequencing — leave it unboxed for manual.
